name: Sydni Edgington
description: Sydni and Maddie met as student employees in WiSE at Iowa State and have been close friends ever since.

name: Elizabeth Cardey
description: Lizzy is Maddie’s cousin and built in best friend, born just a few months before her.

name: Taylor Bergan
description: Taylor is Nick’s twin sister. She studied Animal Science at Iowa State University with a focus on horses.

name: Emily Curry
description: Emily is Nick’s older sister and serves in the Colorado Army National Guard alongside her husband, Ben.

name: Mary McGovern
description: Mary is Maddie’s sister in law. Mary loves to travel, and Maddie actually got to meet Mary on a trip to Dubai.

name: Toph McGovern
description: Toph is Maddie’s youngest sibling who loves horror movies, video games, and Nicki Minaj.

name: Kay McGovern
description: Kay is Maddie’s younger sibling and proud pet parent to 3 dogs and 1 very spoiled cat.
